description: Verify the Electronic Signature Block configuration for provider 'VEHU,ONE' (DFN 1) in the VistA database using the YDBGui web interface. A valid Electronic Signature Block is required for clinicians to sign orders and notes; this data is stored in the New Person file (^VA(200)) under Node 20. Locate and display the Signature Block title, which is the 2nd piece of data in that node.
